name: wcag-2.1-aaa
description: WCAG 2.1 Level AAA enhancements layered on top of AA. Designed to declare alongside `wcag-2.1-aa` (e.g., compliance.regimes: [wcag-2.1-aa, wcag-2.1-aaa]). Layer 2 of the four-layer rubric composition.

severity_rules.pattern: Text foreground/background colour pair has contrast ratio below 7:1 for normal text or 4.5:1 for large text.
severity_rules.description: WCAG 2.1 SC 1.4.6 (AAA) — enhanced contrast extends AA's 4.5:1 baseline to 7:1 for normal text.
severity_rules.remediation: Increase contrast to >= 7:1 (>= 4.5:1 for large text) — overrides the AA threshold from `wcag-aa-perceivable-002`.

severity_rules.pattern: Pre-recorded video with audio content lacks a sign-language interpretation track.
severity_rules.description: WCAG 2.1 SC 1.2.6 (AAA) — sign-language interpretation for prerecorded audio in synchronised media.
severity_rules.remediation: Provide a sign-language video track (picture-in-picture or alternate stream) for prerecorded multimedia.

severity_rules.pattern: Pre-recorded video conveying meaningful visual content lacks an extended audio-description track for pauses.
severity_rules.description: WCAG 2.1 SC 1.2.7 (AAA) — extended audio description must describe visual information that cannot fit in existing pauses.
severity_rules.remediation: Provide an extended-audio-description track that pauses the video to describe critical visual content.

severity_rules.pattern: Body content has a readability score above lower-secondary education level (Flesch-Kincaid > 9, or higher in target language) without a simplified version.
severity_rules.description: WCAG 2.1 SC 3.1.5 (AAA) — when text requires reading ability beyond lower-secondary education, supplemental simpler content must be available.
severity_rules.remediation: Provide a plain-language summary alongside complex content, or offer a `Read in plain language` toggle.

severity_rules.pattern: Content includes ambiguous words (homographs, technical jargon, acronyms on first use) without a pronunciation aid or `<abbr>` expansion.
severity_rules.description: WCAG 2.1 SC 3.1.6 (AAA) — pronunciation must be available where ambiguity affects meaning.
severity_rules.remediation: Use `<abbr title="...">` for acronyms; provide phonetic guidance for ambiguous terms; expand on first use.

severity_rules.pattern: Page enforces a session timeout under 20 hours without a user-controllable extension or warning.
severity_rules.description: WCAG 2.1 SC 2.2.3 (AAA) — content must not be time-limited except for real-time events; users need control over timing.
severity_rules.remediation: Remove the timeout, extend it to >= 20 hours, or provide a clear extension control with prior warning.

severity_rules.pattern: Animation triggered by interaction (parallax, motion-on-scroll) plays without honouring `prefers-reduced-motion`.
severity_rules.description: WCAG 2.1 SC 2.3.3 (AAA) — animations triggered by interaction can be disabled, except where essential.
severity_rules.remediation: Honour the `prefers-reduced-motion` media query; provide a settings toggle to disable animations.
